advisories.sms_preview: Flood risk detected in your area within the next 48 hours. Please move equipment and protect crops where possible.
advisories.simple_advisory: Agle 48 ghante me flood ka risk hai. Kripya kheti ka saman safe jagah par rakh dein aur drainage saaf rakhein.
advisories.advisory_message: High flood risk detected in Patna district. Kosi river levels rising rapidly. Paddy crops in low-lying fields are at 62% crop loss risk. Farmers should take immediate preventive steps and monitor field drainage.
recommended_actions: Move farm equipment to higher ground
Clear drainage channels
Avoid extra irrigation
Protect stored crops with waterproof covering
Keep livestock away from low-lying fields

checklist.task: Cover stored grain with waterproof sheet

advisories.sms_preview: Heavy rain expected in Ludhiana in 36 hours. Check field drainage and avoid pesticide spraying.
advisories.simple_advisory: Agle 36 ghante mein bhari barish aa sakti hai. Kheton ki drainage check karein aur beej ko surakshit rakhein.
advisories.advisory_message: Moderate flood risk in Ludhiana district. Heavy monsoon rainfall forecast may damage standing wheat and delay harvest. Drainage systems should be cleared and farm operations paused.
recommended_actions: Clear and inspect field drainage
Postpone pesticide spraying until after rain
Harvest any mature wheat sections early
Secure farm machinery inside sheds
Avoid ploughing or tilling waterlogged fields

advisories.sms_preview: Extreme heat warning in Barmer. Avoid working in fields between 10am-4pm. Provide shade and water to livestock.
advisories.simple_advisory: Bahut tez garmi aa rahi hai. Dopahar 10 baje se 4 baje ke beech khet mein kaam na karein. Pashuon ko paani aur chhaon dein.
advisories.advisory_message: Extreme heatwave conditions in Barmer, Rajasthan. Surface temperatures exceeding 48°C. Bajra crop is heat-stress tolerant but prolonged exposure risks yield loss. Livestock protection is critical.
recommended_actions: Avoid field work between 10am and 4pm
Provide shade structures for livestock
Increase irrigation frequency to 2x daily
Apply mulching to reduce soil moisture loss
Monitor crop for heat stress symptoms

checklist.task: Check crop leaves for heat stress signs

advisories.sms_preview: Flood warning in Jorhat. Brahmaputra embankments under stress. Move tea garden equipment and paddy seed stock to safety.
advisories.simple_advisory: Jorhat mein baadh ka khatraa hai. Tea garden ka saman aur dhan ka beej surakshit jagah par rakh dein.
advisories.advisory_message: High flood risk in Jorhat district linked to Brahmaputra river embankment stress. Tea gardens in low-lying areas and paddy fields near river banks are at elevated risk of inundation.
recommended_actions: Move tea garden machinery and stock to higher elevation
Protect paddy seedling nurseries from flooding
Clear tea garden drainage trenches
Document crop area for insurance claims
Coordinate with estate manager for evacuation plan

checklist.task: Move tea machinery to higher ground
Alert estate workers to flood protocol

advisories.sms_preview: Heavy rainfall expected in Latur. Soybean fields need drainage attention. Avoid excess irrigation.
advisories.simple_advisory: Latur mein bhari barish aane wali hai. Soybean khet ki naali saaf rakhein. Zyada sinchai na karein.
advisories.advisory_message: Moderate flood risk in Latur from heavy monsoon rainfall. Soybean crops are particularly sensitive to waterlogging. Field drainage must be maintained to prevent root rot and yield loss.
recommended_actions: Improve inter-row drainage in soybean fields
Stop irrigation immediately
Apply raised bed cultivation if possible
Monitor for fungal disease symptoms after rain
Contact KVK for post-flood crop recovery advisory

checklist.task: Clear inter-row drainage in soybean fields
Inspect for root rot after rains

advisories.sms_preview: Cyclone watch active for Puri coast. Paddy farmers: secure crops and move to safety zone within 60 hours.
advisories.simple_advisory: Puri mein toofan ka khatra hai. 60 ghante ke andar apni paddy fasal ko surakshit karein aur safe jagah chalein jaayein.
advisories.advisory_message: Cyclone watch active along Odisha coast near Puri. Standing paddy crops at risk from strong winds and storm surge flooding. Farmers in coastal villages must act within 60-hour window.
recommended_actions: Harvest any mature paddy sections immediately
Secure farm tools and equipment indoors
Move livestock to cyclone shelter
Evacuate to designated safety shelter
Do not attempt to save crops at the cost of personal safety

checklist.task: Secure all farm tools and equipment
Pack essentials and prepare to evacuate

advisories.sms_preview: Cyclone advisory for Kutch. Cotton farmers: secure drip lines, protect young plants. Stay updated.
advisories.simple_advisory: Kutch mein aandhi aa sakti hai. Cotton fasal ki drip line bandh karein, chhote paudhon ko dhakein.
advisories.advisory_message: Cyclone advisory for Kutch coast, Gujarat. Cotton in early growth stage is vulnerable to strong winds and excess rainfall. Drip irrigation systems should be secured and wind breaks considered.
recommended_actions: Shut down and secure drip irrigation lines
Install temporary wind protection for young plants
Avoid pesticide spraying until advisory lifted
Move tractor and farm vehicles to safer location
Monitor local DDMA advisory for evacuation orders

checklist.task: Shut and secure drip irrigation lines
Protect young cotton plants from wind

Bihar.next_48_hours: High flood risk in low-lying regions
Bihar.recommended_action: Send flood advisory SMS and activate local support teams

Punjab.next_48_hours: Moderate flood and heavy rain risk
Punjab.recommended_action: Issue drainage advisory and postpone field operations

Rajasthan.recommended_action: Issue heat advisory and distribute ORS packets to farming communities

Assam.next_48_hours: Brahmaputra embankment risk — severe flooding possible
Assam.recommended_action: Alert tea estate managers and paddy farmers in riverine zones

Maharashtra.recommended_action: Issue drainage advisory for soybean farms in Marathwada

Odisha.next_48_hours: Cyclone watch — coastal paddy farmers must take action
Odisha.recommended_action: Issue cyclone advisory and coordinate with ODRAF for coastal farmer evacuation

Gujarat.next_48_hours: Cyclone advisory — drip line protection needed
Gujarat.recommended_action: Alert cotton farmers in Kutch to secure irrigation systems
